knowledge.insight: KVD: 'When choosing any lure for any situation, account for: water clarity, depth, time of year, water temp, type of cover, current, rising or falling water, weather conditions, and potential mood of the fish. Example: you might throw a frog over grass mats, but after a cold front with high pressure and 10-degree temp drop, punch through instead. Every lure is a tool — use the right one for the conditions.'
